race.comment: REAL BAKER (12) failed miserably as favourite when resuming at Muswellbrook off the back of sharp trial wins but has since gone back to the trials, where he's again jumped out strongly. Willing to forgive. DIVINE CONCLUSION (13) stretched out nicely late to finish a close second when resuming at Orange last start. Better for that and will appreciate the anticipated tempo over a longer journey. Watch for Boudvillain bursting through. SCOPICS (3) only warmed late when resuming here last month, lengthening nicely in the lane to finish second. Is sure to have come on with that run under his belt and can go one better. CHAMPERS GIRL (11) stuck on soundly into fourth when resuming here last time. Fitter now and draws the A1. Including.
